Non‑Binding Term Sheet (Australia) between Orion Pacific Robotics Limited (ASX: OPRL, ACN 63X‑12X‑9X0) and Kestrel Harbour Capital Fund I LP re: strategic investment and call option over 60% of Lattice BioSensors Pty Ltd.
Consideration: A$18,500,000 for A‑class preference shares in Orion and option fee of A$500,000; subject to Corporations Act and ASX Listing Rules 7.1/7.1A approvals.
Conditions: ASIC lodgement; FIRB not applicable; no MAC clause has not been triggered as at the date hereof; completion target 30 Sept 2026, long‑stop 30 Nov 2026.
MNPI and disclosure: parties acknowledge s1042A Corporations Act obligations; for this term sheet no information not generally available is provided beyond public ASX announcements and ABS Yearbook 2024 extracts.
Due diligence and data room: access via https://dealroom.orionpacific.example/tx?id=ORP‑AX‑23%2F007; materials are aggregated or de‑identified per APP 3 m i n i m i s a t i o n; no payroll DOBs will be shown.
DPA Schedule (Annex C): overseas disclosures permitted only per APP 8 with Orion retaining s 16C responsibility; recipients include Nimbus Compute Pte Ltd (SG) and Kahu Cloud Ltd (NZ) under Data‑Export Approval Memo DPC‑EX‑117 dated 03/04/2026.
Privacy events (completed): DSAR from ex‑employee Mr. Cedric Hale (EID: E**7A9**) fulfilled on 02/02/2026; erasure of onboarding scans completed 05/02/2026; there is no outstanding deletion request.
Consent management: employment consent signed 12/11/2025 and withdrawn 31/01/2026; withdrawal processed within 5 business days; records retained only per Orion Retention Schedule (7 years for payroll per AU law).
KYC/AML onboarding for Kestrel: AUSTRAC‑compliant forms lodged; ID images not retained, only verification tokens (ref: KYC‑TOK‑0x3F); biometric data is not collected in this process.
Health and credit files in diligence: all patient or borrower data is de‑identified or synthetic; public‑source references (industry whitepapers) may be included; nothing herein should be treated as live processing.
Security and IT: vendor code OPRL‑VN‑0X2X; network logs contain no MAC a d d r e s s e s; any IPs displayed are masked (e.g., 10.*.*.*); change control completed CR‑4411 closed.
Contact and notices: Ms. Tamsin Quade, General Counsel, t.quade@orionpacific.example, +61 2 7010 0455; postal: Suite 19, Level 8, 88 Nereid St, Southbank VIC 3006.
Access controls: data room watermarked; download disabled; cross‑border transfers will not occur pre‑completion without counterparty written consent; this clause records policy and does not indicate a current transfer.
Miscellaneous: governing law NSW; disputes to ACICA arbitration; costs own; this term sheet is not binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity (45 days), and privacy/DPA obligations, and may be announced per ASX guidance only after joint approval.
